# Strategen: Värderingarna kommer inte stoppa en uppgång

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-08  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode is a conversation with professional gambler Bengt Sonnet about sports betting strategy ahead of the football World Cup, drawing analogies between betting and stock trading (value assessment, odds moving like share prices). No specific companies or equities are discussed; the only market commentary is the general observation that the stock market is a positive-sum game while betting is negative-sum.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
